get.description: Returns 200 OK when the service is running.
Returns counts of groups, tuples, and sources. Only populated when using the PostgreSQL backend; returns zeros for the in-memory store.
Returns groups, optionally filtered by search query and/or sync source ID.

parameters.description: Search query (matches ID or display name)
parameters.name: q

post.description: Creates a new group with the given ID. The token is derived as "group:<id>".

get.description: Returns a single group by its token (e.g. "group:dept_cs").

delete.description: Permanently deletes a group and all its member tuples.

patch.description: Updates the display name and/or description of a group.

get.description: Returns all members of a group. By default resolves members transitively (recursive=true). Set recursive=false for direct members only.

post.description: Adds a user or group token as a direct member of the group.

requestBody.description: Member token to add (e.g. user:email or group:id)

delete.description: Removes a user or group token from the group's direct membership.

parameters.description: Member token to remove (e.g. user:email or group:id)
parameters.name: member

get.description: Returns all configured sync sources (CSV/LDIF files).

post.description: Registers a new sync source. Type must be "csv" or "ldif". An optional cron schedule triggers automatic syncs.

get.description: Returns a single sync source by UUID.

put.description: Updates name, schedule, DN regexp, or file path of an existing sync source.

delete.description: Deletes a sync source and removes all tuples it owned. Groups created by this source are orphaned (not deleted).

get.description: Returns the most recent sync log entries for a source (default: last 20).

post.description: Triggers a sync for a source that has a FilePath configured, reading from that path on disk.
Uploads a CSV or LDIF file and immediately runs a sync for the given source. Replaces all tuples owned by this source.

file.description: CSV or LDIF file to sync

get.description: Returns all tokens for the given email: the user's own token ("user:<email>") plus all group tokens resolved transitively.

200.description: List of tokens (user: and group: prefixed)
